data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Webhook signing for security verification', which is explicitly listed in the needs of the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided in the prior steps that confirms the implementation or coverage of this requirement. The absence of any related evidence indicates a clear gap in satisfying this requirement.
gaps: Webhook signing for security verification not evidenced.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
